text.title: GitHub Actions — Caching and Artifacts Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Run decision tree on build duration + key determinism + secret-class constraints.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: characterise-jobs
step.action: List jobs with install + their lockfile + their outputs.

step.name: define-cache-keys
step.action: Build deterministic keys with restore-keys fallback per ecosystem.

step.name: define-artifacts
step.action: Pick handoff outputs; set retention per category.

step.name: wire-docker-cache-validate
step.action: Enable buildx cache; run validator; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
